CustomField.description: Stores the 18-character ID of the General Accounting Unit (GAU) record used as the default for allocation creation. When Default Allocations are enabled, any unallocated Opportunity amount is assigned to this GAU. This field is set automatically when selecting a default GAU in NPPatch Settings. Must reference an active GAU record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ID of the default General Accounting Unit. Unallocated Opportunity amounts are assigned to this GAU when Default Allocations are enabled.
CustomField.label: Default General Accounting Unit
